caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, tan suspenders, and glasses. He wears a large, grey, pointed wig on his head and black headphones over his ears. In front of him is a black professional microphone. The background features walls adorned with framed photos and clothing items, including garments with the "LEE" logo. On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that reads "THE TALK PODCAST" and text on the right that reads "GOSS TALK JOY". Across the sequence, the man shifts his posture and head position. Initially looking forward, he turns his head to the right and then looks back toward the center, slightly tilting his head down while speaking. His expressions shift slightly as he interacts with someone off-screen, while the background and equipment remain static.
